mapper.insert: INSERT INTO merchant (name, phone, password, address, latitude, longitude, business_hours, delivery_fee, min_order_amount, delivery_time, status, reject_reason, commission_rate) VALUES (#{name}, #{phone}, #{password}, #{address}, #{latitude}, #{longitude}, #{businessHours}, #{deliveryFee}, #{minOrderAmount}, #{deliveryTime}, #{status}, #{rejectReason}, #{commissionRate})
mapper.select: SELECT * FROM merchant WHERE phone = #{phone} AND is_deleted = 0
SELECT * FROM merchant WHERE id = #{id} AND is_deleted = 0
mapper.update:
UPDATE merchant
name = #{name}, address = #{address}, password = #{password}, status = #{status}, latitude = #{latitude}, longitude = #{longitude}, business_hours = #{businessHours}, delivery_fee = #{deliveryFee}, min_order_amount = #{minOrderAmount}, delivery_time = #{deliveryTime}, reject_reason = #{rejectReason}, commission_rate = #{commissionRate},
WHERE id = #{id} AND is_deleted = 0
UPDATE merchant SET is_deleted = 1 WHERE id = #{id}
